style_effects: Constant static sparks of electric blue and white streak across the air, crackling like miniature lightning bolts as they drift upward. A pulsing electromagnetic aura radiates in sharp, jagged waves of neon cyan around its polygonal body, with intense blue-white light emanating from its glowing eyes and tail. The lighting mood is a vibrant, high-energy glow that casts dynamic shadows, evoking a sense of raw power and digital precision. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
